name: Maze
prompt: The user is in a magical maze, trying to reach the center. The user must progress through at least 4 rooms before they can reach the center. Of these rooms, one must have a treasure chest sealed by vines, and one must have an angry enemy who will fight the user. When the user enters the center of the maze after room 4 they have won and the game is over.
blurb: Adventure into the depths of a magical maze to claim the treasures within, defeating enemies and evading traps on the way.

achievementNameExample2.name: Pilferer
achievementNameExample2.condition: Loot a chest or find an item

David.content: David is the owner of this maze. Once someone in the maze finds this fact, David will send a zombie to kill them.
